## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Related issue or research question

Link the relevant issue, proposal, experiment, or manuscript section.

## Validation

Describe the tests, analytical checks, or reproduction steps used.

```bash
pytest -q
```

## Generated outputs

List any figures, tables, CSV files, notebooks, documentation, or paper sections
that were regenerated.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated modifications.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation and public API examples were updated where necessary.
- [ ] Generated results remain synchronized with source code and methodology.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal data, or confidential material are included.
- [ ] Every human-authored commit contains a valid `Signed-off-by` line.
- [ ] I have read the ASR contribution guidelines and DCO 1.1.

> This checkbox is a reminder. The DCO certification itself is the
> `Signed-off-by: Name <email>` trailer in each commit.
